canonical_definition: ST-VQA (Biten et al., 2019) is a benchmark for visual question answering focused on scene text, requiring models to understand text in its visual context.
papers: CogCoM: A Visual Language Model with Chain-of-Manipulations Reasoning
Tracking the Copyright of Large Vision-Language Models through Parameter Learning Adversarial Images

definitions.text: ST-VQA (Biten et al., 2019) is a benchmark for visual question answering focused on scene text, requiring models to understand text in its visual context.

relationships.paper: CogCoM: A Visual Language Model with Chain-of-Manipulations Reasoning
relationships.evidence: TextVQA and ST-VQA are two texts understanding benchmarks requiring models to answer questions through textual cues on images. (Section 5.1.1)

iclr25: CogCoM: A Visual Language Model with Chain-of-Manipulations Reasoning
icml25: R2-T2: Re-Routing in Test-Time for Multimodal Mixture-of-Experts

relationships.paper: CogCoM: A Visual Language Model with Chain-of-Manipulations Reasoning
relationships.evidence: We conduct extensive experiments on 9 benchmarks from 4 categories, including TextVQA (Singh et al., 2019), ST-VQA (Biten et al., 2019), TallyVQA (Acharya et al., 2019), and GQA Hudson & Manning (2019) for detailed visual question answering (Section 1)
